data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Follow-up appointment scheduling', but the evidence does not confirm that such scheduling occurs. While there are multiple bookings and confirmations, there is no explicit evidence showing that a follow-up appointment has been scheduled after the initial diagnostic appointment. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the existence of a follow-up appointment scheduling process.
gaps: No evidence confirming that a follow-up appointment is scheduled after the initial diagnostic appointment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
